title: athlete-enrollment — compliance evidence
description: AthleteEnrollment is safeguarding-adjacent (roster tracking) + consent-adjacent (consent snapshot at confirm) + audit-critical (atomic conversion + expulsion tracking). GDPR Art. 8, Art. 17, SOC 2 CC6.3 + CC7.2, anti-discrimination (expulsion audit).

controls.evidence: consent_snapshot captured at confirm-time preserves the guardian's consent state for the athlete at the moment enrollment became active. Regulator inquiries can inspect the historical consent for compliance.

controls.principle: right to erasure — with retention exception
controls.evidence: Terminal enrollments (completed / withdrawn / expelled) retain 7 years for season-history audits. Regulator-compliance for age-eligibility disputes + membership-record retention.
enrollments.expel is HR + safeguarding_officer + admin + owner only — coaches cannot unilaterally expel (retaliation safeguard). enrollments.audit.atomicity restricted to compliance roles.

ReconcileEnrollmentTeamMemberInvariantJob P1 signal — every finding investigated. `stackra.athlete_enrollment.atomicity.failures_total` should stay at 0. `stackra.athlete_enrollment.invariant.broken` should stay at 0.
Every EnrollmentExpelled + EnrollmentWithdrawn carries reason. Payload NOT exposed to tenant analytics; retained in audits + fed into platform-side compliance dashboard for pattern detection.
Completed enrollments retain 7 years for age-eligibility audits (federation compliance — many governing bodies require multi-year eligibility trails to prevent age-fraud in youth divisions).
